summary: Tested the new MemberBadge / avatar / welcome-toast surface. Backend (curl): POST /api/family/members with avatar data-URL persists (len 114); POST /api/auth/member/select returns member with avatar + is_family_admin=true; non-admin PUT avatar on another member -> 403; PUT avatar='' clears to null; PUT avatar=<dataURL> sets it. Frontend (Playwright, 1920x1080, fresh family qa-av-<ts>): /wall-board shows 'wall-member-strip' with member-badge-name=Alice, member-badge-admin-chip present, member-avatar-<id> element rendered; welcome 'Welcome back, Alice' toast shows on first visit and is GONE after manual reload (sessionStorage flag works); after swapping member_token to non-admin Theresa, the wall-board badge shows name=Theresa with admin_chip_count=0 and a fresh 'Welcome back, Theresa' toast (per-member sessionStorage key). /time-plan shows 'tp-member-strip' with name=Alice (admin chip suppressed because compact=true — by design per MemberBadge code). Cache refresh path verified by writing mfml_member with name='Bahaa Updated' to localStorage and reloading /wall-board: member-badge-name now reads 'Bahaa Updated'. Arabic toast = 'أهلاً بعودتك، Bahaa Updated' and German toast = 'Willkommen zurück, Bahaa Updated' — no raw key leaks. HOWEVER three of the five required strip testids are MISSING from the DOM (see frontend_issues).

ui_bugs.issue: Component renders a hard-coded data-testid='member-badge' and does NOT forward/spread an incoming data-testid prop onto its root div. As a result, the strip testids in HomeBudget.jsx, MyMoney.jsx and FamilyMembers.jsx never reach the DOM.

Uses but the testid is dropped because MemberBadge doesn't accept it. Fix either (a) wrap it:
like WallBoard does, or (b) accept and spread the testid in MemberBadge.
Same problem: <MemberBadge data-testid='my-money-member-strip' /> testid never reaches DOM.

Same problem: <MemberBadge data-testid='family-members-member-strip' /> testid never reaches DOM (the badge itself renders fine, screenshot confirms 'Bahaa Updated · ADMIN' is visible at top of /family-members).

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/components/MemberBadge.jsx, make the root <div> spread an optional `data-testid` (or all `...rest` props) so callers that pass <MemberBadge data-testid='...'/> actually surface that id. Alternatively, wrap each MemberBadge usage in HomeBudget.jsx, MyMoney.jsx and FamilyMembers.jsx in a <div data-testid='budget-member-strip'/etc>, mirroring how WallBoard.jsx (line 1733) and TimePlan.jsx (line 344) already do.

After the fix, re-run the four selectors above to verify they resolve, and confirm the FamilyMembers Add-dialog avatar picker testids (avatar-upload-btn / avatar-file-input / avatar-remove-btn) — this run could not progress to that step because the strip selector blocked the test.
critical_code_review_comments: MemberBadge.jsx hard-codes a single data-testid='member-badge'. Three of the five page integrations rely on passing a unique testid per page — none of them work. This is the only blocker.

TimePlan's MemberBadge is in compact mode which silently hides the admin chip (current spec says the chip is only required on Wall Board for the admin path; tests should not expect 'tp-member-strip' to contain member-badge-admin-chip).
translations.js is now ~2k+ lines — splitting per-namespace (auth/budget/members/...) JSON files would help long-term, but not blocking.

success_rate.backend: 100% (POST avatar, PUT set, PUT clear, select returns avatar+admin, 403 on cross-member PUT)
success_rate.frontend: 67% — 8/12 expectations met. Pass: wall-member-strip + member-badge + member-badge-name + admin chip + member-avatar-<id>, welcome toast on first visit, no-toast on reload, fresh toast after switching member, non-admin has no admin chip, cache-refresh updates name without re-login, AR + DE welcome strings render. Fail: budget-member-strip, my-money-member-strip, family-members-member-strip selectors not in DOM (root cause: MemberBadge ignores data-testid prop). tp-member-strip works but does not contain admin chip (by-design compact mode).

test_credentials: Fresh per run: qa-av-<ts>@example.com / Pass1234! (confirm_password is REQUIRED on /api/auth/register — previous testers should note this). Bootstrap: Alice (admin, PIN 1234, avatar=tiny PNG data URL), Theresa (adult, PIN 2222, no avatar).
seed_data_creation: Single fresh family TEST_AV registered each run; admin Alice with avatar + non-admin Theresa added via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: POST /api/auth/register requires {family_name,email,password,confirm_password}. Selectors for the badge: data-testid='member-badge', child name 'member-badge-name', admin chip 'member-badge-admin-chip', avatar 'member-avatar-<id>'. Page-level strip wrappers only exist on WallBoard ('wall-member-strip') and TimePlan ('tp-member-strip') — the other three are passed as props to MemberBadge and are currently dropped (see ui_bugs). Welcome toast key in sessionStorage is mfml_welcomed_<member_id>=1; clear sessionStorage to see it again. Drive auth by seeding localStorage keys mfml_account_token, mfml_member_token, mfml_account, mfml_family, mfml_member, mfml_auth_ok='true', mfml_lang.
rca of the issue: MemberBadge.jsx (src/components/MemberBadge.jsx) signature is `({ member, compact, showAdminBadge, className })` — no `data-testid` or `...rest`. Its root <div> always emits data-testid='member-badge'. Pages HomeBudget.jsx (L1308), MyMoney.jsx (L351) and FamilyMembers.jsx (L232) call `<MemberBadge data-testid='...'/>` expecting the prop to land on the DOM, but React simply drops it. WallBoard.jsx and TimePlan.jsx instead wrap the badge in a <div data-testid='wall-member-strip'/'tp-member-strip'>, which is why those two work. Fix: either accept `data-testid` (and other ARIA/data-* via `...rest`) in MemberBadge and spread it on the root div, or wrap the three offending usages in a parent div like the working pages do.
